---
mode: agent
description: Stage all changes and commit with a short, descriptive message
---

Stage all changed files and create a git commit. The commit message must be:

- Short (under 72 characters)
- Descriptive — say what changed, not why
- Lowercase, no period at the end
- No generic messages like "update files" or "make changes"

Examples of good messages:

- `add crawl-space-mold-health-risks blog post`
- `fix canonical URL on encapsulation page`
- `update phone number in footer`

Look at the changed files to determine an accurate message, then stage and commit.
